tasks.title: Hide action panel during intro dialog
tasks.description: Add a guard in updateUI() to hide the #action-panel element when state.introDialogOpen is true, and show it otherwise.
tasks.acceptance_criteria: The action panel (all action buttons) is not visible while the intro dialog is displayed. Once the intro dialog is dismissed, the action panel appears normally with correct button states.
tasks.claudeMd:
# Hide Actions During Intro Dialog

You are fixing a vanilla JS browser game (single file: game.js, ~1960 lines).

## What to change

In `updateUI()` (around line 809 in game.js), the function shows/hides individual action buttons. Add a check at the START of the action-button section:

1. Get the `action-panel` element: `document.getElementById('action-panel')`
2. If `state.introDialogOpen` is truthy, set `actionPanel.style.display = 'none'` and skip the rest of the action logic (return early from that section or wrap in else)
3. Otherwise, set `actionPanel.style.display = ''` and let existing logic run

## Key state
- `state.introDialogOpen` — starts `true` (line 93), set to `false` when user clicks Begin button or presses X
- `updateUI()` is called on every game tick/action, so the panel will reappear automatically after dismissal

## Conventions
- Vanilla JS, no framework. Uses `var` not `let/const`. Match existing style.
- Inline `style.display` toggling (not CSS classes) — match the pattern used for individual buttons
- No over-engineering. Minimal diff.

checklist.description: Action panel is hidden when intro dialog is open
steps: In game.js updateUI(), before the action button visibility block (~line 809), add code to hide #action-panel when state.introDialogOpen is true
Verify by reading the code that the panel display is set to 'none' when introDialogOpen is true

checklist.description: Action panel reappears after intro dialog is dismissed
steps: Verify the code sets action-panel display back to '' when introDialogOpen is false
Verify updateUI() is called after dismissIntroDialog (it is — existing flow handles this)

quality_checklist.description: Change is minimal and matches existing code style
steps: Check that only game.js was modified
Check that var is used (not let/const)
Check that the diff is under 10 lines

checks.description: Action panel is hidden during intro dialog and visible after dismissing it
steps: Open the game in browser at localhost:3000
Verify the intro dialog is displayed
Verify the action panel (Gather Resource, Build Rock Hovel, etc.) is NOT visible
Click the Begin button to dismiss the intro dialog
Verify the action panel is now visible with appropriate buttons
